chapter_title.ar: بَابُ كِفَايَةِ الْعِيَالِ وَ التَّوَسُّعِ عَلَيْهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 54 – Adequacy for the dependants and extending upon them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/137)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/137)
text: قَالَ صَاحِبُ النِّعْمَةِ يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ التَّوْسِعَةُ عَنْ عِيَالِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Abu Nasr,
(It has been narrated) from Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The owner of the bounties, it is Obligated upon him that he extends upon his dependants’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “Al-Rida, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A wealthy person should improve the quality of life of his family.’”
